s-1.ptxt: FIX REAR SHOCK ABSORBER WITH COIL SPRING

s2.ptxt: As shown in the illustration, secure the rear shock absorber with coil spring in a vise using aluminum plates by closing the vise onto the double nutted bolt affixed to the bracket at the bottom of the absorber.
Using SST, compress the rear coil spring.

atten3.ptxt: Do not use an impact wrench.

atten4.ptxt: If the front coil spring is compressed at an angle, using 2 SST will make the work easier.

s2.ptxt: Remove the nut, rear shock absorber collar and rear suspension support assembly.
Remove the rear coil spring, rear No. 1 spring bumper, and rear coil spring lower insulator.
